settings.enabled_help: Master switch to enable or disable the civility filter.
settings.ai_provider_help: Select which AI provider to use. Set the corresponding API key below.
settings.api_key_help: Your Anthropic API key for Claude models.
settings.openai_api_key_help: Your OpenAI API key for GPT models.
settings.openrouter_api_key_help: Your OpenRouter API key. Access 200+ models from one API.
settings.model_help: Select a model matching your chosen provider.
settings.warn_threshold_help: Score at or above this level will log a warning. Default: 60
settings.hold_threshold_help: Score at or above this level will hold the post for moderation. Default: 80
settings.block_threshold_help: Score at or above this level will block the post entirely. Default: 95
settings.log_all_help: Log all civility checks, including posts that pass. When disabled, only flagged posts are logged.
settings.monitored_tags_help: Select tags to monitor. Leave empty to monitor all tags.
settings.custom_prompt_help: Override the default analysis prompt. Must instruct the AI to return JSON with score, categories, and reason fields. Leave empty for default.
settings.word_blocklist_help: One word/phrase per line. Posts containing these will be instantly blocked without calling the AI.
settings.webhook_url_help: Discord webhook or generic URL to receive alerts when posts are flagged. Leave empty to disable.
settings.webhook_min_action_help: Only send webhook alerts for this action level or higher.
settings.auto_suspend_threshold_help: Automatically suspend a user after this many violations within the window. Set to 0 to disable.
settings.auto_suspend_days_help: How many days to suspend a user. Default: 3
settings.auto_suspend_window_help: Count violations within this many days. Default: 7
settings.rate_limit_help: Maximum AI API calls per hour. Posts will pass through unchecked if limit is reached. Set to 0 for unlimited.

log.title: Civility Filter Log
log.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the entire civility log?

test.title: Test Analyzer
test.message_placeholder: Enter a test message to analyze...

forum.post_notice_warned_author: Your post was flagged by the civility filter. Please keep discussions respectful and constructive.
forum.post_notice_warned_mod: This post was flagged by the civility filter for potential incivility. (Only visible to staff)
forum.post_notice_moderated: This post was held for moderation by the civility filter due to potentially harmful content.
forum.notification_warned: Your recent post was flagged by the civility filter. Please keep discussions respectful.
forum.notification_moderated: Your recent post was held for moderation by the civility filter. A moderator will review it shortly.

settings.notify_civility_flagged: Someone flags my post for civility

api.post_blocked: Your post was blocked by the civility filter. Please revise your message to be more respectful and constructive, then try again.
